---
author: "Jacopo Olivieri"
date: 2024-01-02
editor: source
format: html
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
  fig-width: 9
  fig-asp: 0.618 
  fig-align: center
---

# Sewage Spill Data Exploration {#sec-spill-exploration}

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Initialize packages with version control
if (!requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("renv")
}

# Run manual renv commands if needed
# renv::activate() # Activate the project library
# renv::restore()  # Restore the environment if running for first time
# renv::snapshot()  # After adding/updating packages, snapshot the state


# Load required packages
required_packages <- c("rmarkdown", "rio", "tidyverse", "purrr", "here",
                       "janitor", "sf", "sp", "rnaturalearth", 
                       "rnaturalearthdata", "rnrfa", "DescTools",
                       "gridExtra", "modelsummary", "rgeoboundaries",
                       "tmap", "leaflet")
install_if_missing <- function(packages) {
  new_packages <- packages[!sapply(packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
  if (length(new_packages) > 0) {
    install.packages(new_packages)
  }
  invisible(sapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
}
install_if_missing(required_packages)


# Initialize logging
log_path <- here::here("output", "log", "spill_data_exploration.log")
if (!dir.exists(dirname(log_path))) {
  dir.create(dirname(log_path), recursive = TRUE)
}
logger::log_appender(logger::appender_file(log_path))
logger::log_layout(logger::layout_glue_colors)
```

```{r, load_data}
dat <- import(here("data", "processed", 
                   "individual_edm_location.RDATA"), trust = TRUE)

dat_yr <- dat$yearly
dat_mo <- dat$monthly
```


## Geographic Distribution {#sec-geo-distribution}

```{r, plot-spill-stats}

# Clean data
dat_yr_clean <- dat_yr %>%
  filter(outlet_discharge_ngr != "Unable to match to Consents Database",
         outlet_discharge_ngr != "Not in Consents Database",
         spill_hrs_yr > 0) %>% 
  mutate(
    outlet_discharge_ngr = str_replace(outlet_discharge_ngr, "(?i)Not.*", ""),
    outlet_discharge_ngr = str_extract(outlet_discharge_ngr, "^[^,&/\\(]+"),
    outlet_discharge_ngr = str_remove_all(outlet_discharge_ngr, "\\s+")
  ) 

coordinates <- osg_parse(dat_yr_clean$outlet_discharge_ngr,
                         coord_system = "BNG")

dat_yr_clean <- dat_yr_clean %>% 
  mutate(
    northing = coordinates$northing/10,  
    easting = coordinates$easting,
    across(contains("spill"), log, .names = "log_{.col}")) 

dat_yr_clean <- dat_yr_clean %>% 
  filter(year == 2021) %>%
    mutate(
      across(
        contains("spill"),
        ~ Winsorize(.x, 
                    val = quantile(.x, probs = c(0.01, 0.99), na.rm = TRUE))
      ),
      across(contains("spill"), log, .names = "log_{.col}")
    ) %>%
    st_as_sf(coords = c("easting", "northing"), crs = 27700) %>%
    st_transform(crs = 4326)

uk_map <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf") %>%
  filter(sovereignt %in% c("United Kingdom"))


# Create plots for multiple years
create_yearly_plots <- function(sf_data, year) {
  list(
    hrs = plot_spill_map(
      sf_data,
      "log_spill_hrs_yr",
      glue::glue("Log\nAnnual Spill\nDuration")
    ),
    hrs_tmap = plot_spill_map_tmap(
      sf_data,
      "log_spill_hrs_yr",
      glue::glue("Log\nAnnual Spill\nDuration")
    ),
    count = plot_spill_map(
      sf_data,
      "log_spill_count_yr",
      glue::glue("Log\nAnnual Spill\nCount")
    ),
    count_tmap = plot_spill_map_tmap(
      sf_data,
      "log_spill_count_yr",
      glue::glue("Log\nAnnual Spill\nCount")
    )
  )
}

```

```{r}
tmap_mode("view")

tm_shape(uk_map) +
  tm_polygons(
    fill = "grey90",
    col = "white"
  ) +
  tm_shape(dat_yr_clean) +
  tm_dots(
    size = 0.4,
    fill = log_spill_hrs_yr,
    fill_alpha = 0.7,
    fill.scale = tm_scale(
      values = "-magma",
      interval = "continuous"
    ),
    fill.legend = tm_legend(
      title = "Spill Hours",
      position = c("left", "bottom")
    )
  ) +
  tm_layout(
    legend.text.size = 0.8,
    legend.title.size = 1
  ) +
  tm_view(
    set_view = c(-2, 53, 5.5)  
  )

# UK Map
```
